title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: Tutorial showcasing ImagineArt Film Studio's approach to solving character consistency in AI-generated films through storyboarding, character locking, and multi-shot generation. The creator built a 60-second short film with consistent character appearance across four different environments using the browser-based platform.
